title: Code42 Suspicious Activity Review v2
content:
Detects suspicious activities of a user and allows a recipient to assess the results. Afterward, the playbook takes action on the user such as adding them to legal hold.

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Code42 pack (Code42, partner-supported).

Inputs — Username: The username of the employee.; ReviewerEmail: The email recipient to review potential suspicious activity related to the user, such as the user's manager.; LegalHoldMatterId: The legal hold matter ID to add the user to if selecting ADD-TO-LEGAL-HOLD in the Decide Remediation Action task..

Integrations/scripts used: Code42, ConvertTableToHTML.

      expired: false
